chinese_news.title: 五月，适合想清楚一件事｜幕启
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

5月4日，一个被默认为“青年专属”的日期。

但在我看来，“青年”一词从来不只和年龄挂钩，每一个还在试探人生的节拍与正轨的人，身体里都住着一位渴望力量的青年。

[1]

敲定新品牌命名的那一刻其实很轻。在讨论方案的脑暴会上，我夸了实习生一句“有Sense”，他眼神一亮：“这个词好诶。”

许多年前，我还是一个初入职场的新人，在猎头行

chinese_news.title: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
近日，豆包App Store页面出现付费版本服务声明。声明称，为更好地服务专业用户，豆包将在免费版的基础上，推出包含更多增值服务的付费版本。同时，该页面还披露了三档订阅价格：标准版连续包月每月68元（连续包年688元）、加强版连续包月每月200元（连续包年2048元）、专业版连续包月每月500元（连续包年5088元）。

 

豆包

 

目前，尚未在豆包产品中看到相关的付费选项和功能。豆包官方回应称，“豆包始终提供免费服务，在

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 张雪机车再夺冠军！荣耀宣布推出张雪机车冠军联名款手表
chinese_news.summary: 在2026世界超级摩托车锦标赛（WSBK）匈牙利站WorldSSP组别第一回合正赛中，中国摩托车制造商张雪机车的法国车手瓦伦丁·德比斯通过最后时刻的反超绝杀夺得冠军。赛后，荣耀CEO李健发文祝贺，并宣布作为张雪机车WSBK的首席战略合作品牌，荣耀将推出双方的冠军联名款手表，以庆祝这一夺冠时刻。 此前在4月初，荣耀已正式成为张雪机车WSBK首席战略合作品牌。荣耀首席营销官关海涛曾代表品牌向车队赠送荣耀WIN系列手机及荣耀WIN游戏本，寄望该系列产品能为车手带来胜利。荣耀此次通过与冠军联名，旨在借助国际赛事热度与效应，进一步提升品牌在年轻用户群体及运动场景中的影响力。 5月2日消息，在刚刚结束的2026世界超级摩托车锦标赛（WSBK）匈牙利站WorldSSP组别第一回合正赛中，中国摩托车制造商张雪机车的法国车手瓦伦丁·德比斯，最后时刻反超绝杀，强势夺冠。 赛后，荣耀CEO李健发文祝贺张雪机车夺冠，称这是一场“让所有观众都无比骄傲的比赛”。 与此同时，李健还宣布，作为张雪机车WSBK的首席战略合作品牌，荣耀将推出与张雪机车的冠军联名款手表，来庆祝这个历史性的夺冠时刻。

chinese_news.title: 卓驭于贝贝：向物理AI转型，是生存法则的必然选择 | 最前线
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

当下的智能汽车领域，物理 AI 已成为高频词汇，绝大多数智能驾驶算法厂商都在往“物理AI”转型。

卓驭在北京车展上也发布了面向移动物理 AI 的原生多模态基础模型。在卓驭科技副总裁于贝贝看来，算法厂商向物理AI转型不是为了迎合资本市场而编织的想象空间，而是一条关乎厂商存亡的生存法则。

“如果不上这条技术路线，很可能今后就跑不出来了。”于贝贝说。

在新的竞争维度上，算法厂商的对手不再仅仅是曾经的同行，还包括那些从数字 AI 领域跨界而来的巨头、具身智能公司等。

这场全新的竞赛让算法厂商进入全新维度的淘汰赛中，而此次能真正跑出来的玩家，其商业空间也将随着打开。

基于移动基座模型，卓驭已经开始尝试打破传统Tier 1“卖硬件、收开发费”的单一逻辑。在第二增长曲线中，通过将乘用车技术拓展至 Robotaxi、RoboVan 等 L4 级领域，卓驭正在探索一种基于订阅、利润分成以及“动作令牌（Action Token）”的新商业形态。

chinese_news.title: 在硅谷，中美具身公司聊了聊了4个问题的解法
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨

编辑｜杨轩

规模化落地，今年的具身公司都在谈这个。

数字竞速，不约而同出现在具身公司的产线、招股书、出货量上——2026年4月以来，智元机器人宣布第1万台机器人量产下线，5000到10000，只用了三个多月；宇树科技的IPO招股书也摊开了激进商业化的一角：2025年营收17.07亿元，出货量超过5500台。

激进的数字背后，是“低价、高性能”的中国机器人在全球的扩张。宇树科技创始人王兴兴曾在2025年世界机器人大会上提到，过去几年，宇树的海外营收一直占总营收的50%以上。

在这些具身玩家中，魔法原子MagicLab近期提出了一个相当激进的营收目标：2036年，要实现140亿美元的营收规模。

在全球范围内打响品牌，也让这家公司，将发布会开进了硅谷。美西时间2026年4月28日，在云集Adobe、TikTok、IBM等公司的圣何塞，魔法原子发起了全球具身智能创新大会（GEIS）。

chinese_news.title: 周杰伦伙伴，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/吴琼

报道/投资界PEdaily

音乐顶流也迎来了卖身结局。

近日，华尔街大佬比尔·阿克曼旗下潘兴广场正式向环球音乐（UMG）发出一份收购要约——以现金加股票的方式收购环球音乐。由此，后者估值高达约640亿美元（约合人民币4300亿元）。

你或许不熟悉环球音乐，但一定听过来自这里的歌——周杰伦、陈奕迅、泰勒·斯威夫特、贾斯汀·比伯、防弹少年团……这些顶流艺人的音乐作品，均由环球音乐发行或持有版权。每当你打开音乐软件，也许就有一笔

chinese_news.title: 茶颜悦色 , 装不下去了
chinese_news.summary:
以慢著称，不爱出省的奶茶界“初代网红”茶颜悦色，终于又向外迈出了一步。

近日，茶颜悦色深圳门店开业，两家门店分别坐落于深圳万象城与深圳万象天地。据媒体报道，开业首日，门店外就聚集了大批顾客，等位队伍已经排至商场外围，提示牌显示，“排队需要5小时”。

图源：二手交易平台截图

黄牛们也闻风而动，据二手交易平台数据，原价十几元一杯的茶颜悦色奶茶，代购价格均被炒至30—100元。

然而，从开业第二天开始，排队人数明显骤减，等候时间缩至1小时。甚至比起想要排队打卡，许多网友的态

chinese_news.title: 又一算力独角兽，冲击IPO
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨韦香惠

来源丨东四十条资本

A股即将迎来一只“算力独角兽”，估值已站上500亿元门槛。

主角是来自河南的超聚变数字技术股份有限公司。从今年1月提交上市辅导备案，到IPO辅导工作完成，仅用四个多月时间。

这家公司并非“从零起步”，其前身是华为X86服务器业务，2021年受外部环境影响被整体剥离，并独立运营。随后，河南超聚能科技有限公司成为控股股东，持股31.38%，后者大股东则为河南国资平台豫信电子科技集团。此外，超聚变第二大股东系中国移动旗下中移资本，持股15.14%。成立至今，核聚变已至少完成8轮股权融资，身后VC/PE超过30家。

超聚变之所以受资本青睐，离不开“算力即国运”的时代背书。2026年《政府工作报告》明确提出“打造智能经济新形态”，并将“超大规模智算集群、算电协同”等纳入新型基础设施重点方向。在此背景下，从东部沿海到西部内陆，从一线城市到新兴节点城市，算力基础设施建设正呈现出全面铺开的态势。

华为子公司落地河南

market_questions_to_create.question: Will China ban or severely restrict fireworks manufacturing following the May 2025 Hunan factory explosion that killed 26+ people?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Chinese government announcements from State Council or relevant ministry (SAMR, emergency management); news confirmations from Xinhua, China Daily, or CCP official channels
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Industrial safety crackdowns in China often happen rapidly after high-casualty incidents; this explosion (26 dead, 61 injured) is severe enough to trigger regulatory response, but Western markets haven't priced in broader supply/commodity implications for pyrotechnics, potassium nitrate, sulfur exports.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC World: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people in Hunan province—represents latest in series of 'incidents' (implying pattern) at manufacturing sites

market_questions_to_create.question: Will any major U.S. airline file for Chapter 11 bankruptcy within 180 days (by November 30, 2025)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Bankruptcy Court PACER filings; SEC 8-K disclosures; airline industry announcements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Spirit Airlines dismantling is labeled 'biggest collapse in a generation'—this normalizes airline bankruptcy as systemic risk, but markets haven't repriced contagion risk to other fragile carriers (Frontier, Alaska, Southwest all vulnerable to fuel/labor shocks).
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic issue or pre-announce a commercial security/vulnerability-fixing product within 120 days?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Anthropic blog, press release, or product launch announcement; product available for beta or GA
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Dario Amodei's explicit warning of cyber 'moment of danger' and 'narrow window' to fix vulnerabilities signals that Anthropic sees a commercial opportunity—and is likely to monetize it. Prediction markets underweight AI-as-security-infrastructure as a TAM.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber 'moment of danger' as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities; 'narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana network process >10M transactions/day on average in Q2 2025?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Solana blockchain explorer (Solscan, Helius); official Solana Foundation metrics
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Solana Alpenglow upgrade arriving next quarter; Western Union stablecoin and tokenization tailwind creating real transaction volume; market is pricing Solana as speculative token rather than growing settlement layer.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Solana's 'Alpenglow' upgrade could arrive next quarter; Western Union's Solana-based stablecoin could reshape payment model; Centrifuge (Solana-native) in top crypto trends

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Microsoft/Xbox announce a major third-party studio acquisition or exclusive IP partnership by Q3 2025?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Microsoft/Xbox press release, SEC 8-K, or major gaming media confirmations (IGN, GameSpot, VGC)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Xbox CEO overhauled leadership and explicitly stated 'doesn't spend enough time with developers'—classic pre-acquisition/partnership restructuring signal. Market hasn't priced aggressive IP/studio consolidation play yet.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Microsoft Xbox CEO overhauls leadership; 'We need to evolve how we work'—focuses on developer/player relationships (acquisition/partnership precursor language)

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor memory (Micron, via MU or sector ETFs like SMH) on AI chip demand inelasticity + options market positioning bubble signal lasting through Q2.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap; insatiable demand for memory in AI chips
CNBC: Intel and Micron poised to break major milestones
CNBC: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks
investment_theses.counter_view: AI training demand may have peaked; memory oversupply risk if major cloud providers (NVDA, AMD customers) throttle capex in H2 2025; Micron valuation already reflects 2-3 years of growth.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU; or long SMH (semiconductor ETF); consider selling call spreads above $750 to cap upside and lock in premium

investment_theses.thesis: Long crypto tokenization infrastructure plays (Figure, Centrifuge, Ripple ecosystem) on expanding institutional TAM + regulatory clarity tailwind; BUT short duration (rotate out by July).
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Figure targets Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac; massive cost cuts claimed
Cointelegraph: Bernstein cites $4T tokenized credit opportunity for Figure
CoinDesk: Western Union's Solana-based stablecoin could reshape payment model
CoinDesk: Bitcoin extends gains to $81,500 as tokenization push lifts Bullish, Galaxy, Centrifuge
investment_theses.counter_view: Tokenization remains niche / early-stage; traditional finance incumbents (Fannie Mae, Western Union) have no urgency to deploy; regulatory clarity could be priced-in already; token volatility outpaces fundamental adoption.
investment_theses.expression: Long CFG (Centrifuge), FIG (Figure), XRP; set June profit-taking targets; hedge with short DXY (reduces crypto correlation risk)

investment_theses.thesis: Short U.S. commercial airline sector (ALK, ULCC names, via FAA safety/cost metrics) as Spirit collapse signals structural vulnerability; extend to insurance carriers (aviation liability).
supporting_signals: CNBC: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after 'biggest collapse in a generation'
Implicit: Other carriers (Frontier, Southwest, Alaska) share similar cost structures / labor burden; no fundamental improvement in unit economics
investment_theses.counter_view: Remaining carriers (Southwest, Alaska, Frontier) are already stress-tested by investors; equity already repriced down; bankruptcy risk is known and differentiated by balance sheet; fuel prices could fall and ease margins.
investment_theses.expression: Short ALK (Alaska Air); short ULCC sector via puts; or short airline insurance (XL, AIG airline exposure); consider 6-month puts OTM 15-20%

investment_theses.thesis: Long Chinese 'hard goods' AI/robotics infrastructure plays (physical embodied AI, compute hardware) as 36Kr signals acceleration in commercialization and IPO-readiness (Zhiyuan, Unitree, Superfusion); watch for capital allocation into these names.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Zhiyuan announced 10,000th robot mass production (5K–10K in 3 months); Unitree IPO prospectus reveals 2025 revenue 17.07B yuan, 5500+ units shipped
36Kr: Zhuoyu VP says 'physical AI transition is survival law, not hype'—signals real competition/consolidation
Implicit: Chinese robotics/hardware vendors moving faster on commercialization than Western peers (Tesla Bot, Figure AI still at pilot stage)
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese hardware listings may trade at lower multiples due to geopolitical risk / delisting concerns; actual profitability unproven; global supply chain fragmentation (chips) could halt scaling; Western AI robotics could catch up rapidly.
investment_theses.expression: Long Chinese embodied AI / hardware IPOs as they launch (Zhiyuan, Unitree if they hit public markets); or gain exposure via Hang Seng tech index (0700.HK, TCEHY); avoid direct ADR risk

investment_theses.thesis: Long China fintech / AI payments ecosystem (tokenization, stablecoins, payment rails) following Western Union + Solana partnership announcement; Bytedance's Doubao paid subscription rollout signals willingness to monetize AI—expect more financial service integration.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Western Union's Solana-based stablecoin could reshape payment model
36Kr: Doubao (Bytedance AI) launching paid tiers (¥68–¥500/month), flagging AI monetization inflection
Implicit: China regulatory softening on blockchain/stablecoin (Western Union deal signals);
investment_theses.counter_view: Western Union-Solana deal remains unproven; Doubao paid tiers may cannibalize free usage without proportional revenue uplift; China fintech regulation could reverse (capital controls, CBDC dominance kills private stablecoins).
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL (Solana) as Western Union settlement layer; long Hong Kong fintech plays (0700.HK Tencent, 9618.HK JD.com payment angle); or long PENGU (Pudgy Penguins) as meme sentiment on Solana ecosystem broadens
